acceptedValues.notes: Third-party representative identifier. When present, enables TTB to disclose application status to that representative.

fields.specialistNotes: Optional field; absence is never a defect. Not printed on labels, so it is never part of label-vs-application matching.

fields.ttbTerm: Plant Registry / Basic Permit / Brewer's Notice No.

acceptedValues.notes: BW- (bonded wine) or TPWBH- for wine, DSP- for distilled spirits, BR- for beer. Also accepts an importer's basic permit number for imports.

failureMessages.fail: "{extracted}" does not match a recognized permit/registry prefix (BW-, TPWBH-, DSP-, BR-).
failureMessages.missing: Plant Registry / Basic Permit / Brewer's Notice No. is required and was not found.

fields.specialistNotes: Verify the prefix matches the declared Type of Product (DSP- for spirits, BW-/TPWBH- for wine, BR- for malt).

failureMessages.fail: "{extracted}" is not a valid Source of Product; must be "Domestic" or "Imported".
failureMessages.missing: Source of Product is required.

fields.specialistNotes: If Imported, Country of Origin must be present on the label and Certificate of Exemption applications are not permitted.

acceptedValues.notes: Two-digit year, hyphen, sequential number assigned by the applicant.

failureMessages.fail: "{extracted}" does not match the required serial number format YY-N (e.g. 24-1).
failureMessages.missing: Serial Number is required.

fields.specialistNotes: Assigned sequentially by the applicant, not by TTB. Used as the resubmission reference on Item 14d.

failureMessages.fail: "{extracted}" is not one of WINE, DISTILLED SPIRITS, or MALT BEVERAGES.
failureMessages.missing: Type of Product is required.

fields.specialistNotes: Determines which product-specific field set, ABV bounds, and standard-fill list apply for the rest of the review.

acceptedValues.notes: Name under which the product is sold. If no brand name is used, the bottler/importer name must be used as the brand name.

allowableRevisions: 3b: case, font, and abbreviation changes do not require a new COLA

failureMessages.fail: Label brand name "{extracted}" does not match application Brand Name "{expected}".
failureMessages.missing: Brand Name was not found on the label.

fields.specialistNotes: Case and punctuation differences (e.g. "stone's throw" vs "STONE'S THROW") are an allowable revision, not a defect. A substantive brand name change always requires a new COLA.

fields.required: required for some specialty products; otherwise optional

acceptedValues.notes: Further identifies the product beyond the brand name (e.g. a specific blend or cuvée name).

allowableRevisions: 3b: case, font, and abbreviation changes do not require a new COLA

failureMessages.fail: Label fanciful name "{extracted}" does not match application Fanciful Name "{expected}".
failureMessages.missing: Fanciful Name was declared on the application but not found on the label.

fields.specialistNotes: Only compare when the application declares a fanciful name; its absence on the label is not a defect if Item 7 was left blank on the application.

acceptedValues.notes: Must exactly match the plant registry, basic permit, or brewer's notice on file, including any approved DBA/trade name.

allowableRevisions: 19: name/address change within the same state does not require a new COLA

failureMessages.fail: Applicant name/address does not match the permit/registry on file.
failureMessages.missing: Name and Address of Applicant is required.

fields.specialistNotes: This is the source-of-truth for the label's Name and Address field (see 'bottler').

acceptedValues.notes: Only completed if different from Item 8.

fields.specialistNotes: Correspondence-only field; never printed on a label.

acceptedValues.notes: Must be a recognized class/type designation for the declared Type of Product. See lib/ttb-rules.ts SPIRITS_CLASS_TYPES / WINE_CLASS_TYPES / MALT_CLASS_TYPES for the authoritative list.

allowableRevisions: 3b: case, font, and abbreviation changes do not require a new COLA

failureMessages.fail: Label class/type "{extracted}" is not a recognized TTB class/type designation for {productType} (27 CFR Parts 4, 5, 7).
failureMessages.missing: Class/Type designation was not found on the label.

fields.specialistNotes: For spirits, brand name, alcohol content, and class/type must appear in the same field of vision (see 'sameFieldOfVision').

fields.required: always required for spirits; required for wine unless labeled 'table wine' ≤14% or 'dessert wine'; required for malt only if alcohol is derived from added flavors/non-beverage ingredients

acceptedValues.notes: Bounds sourced from lib/ttb-rules.ts ABV_BOUNDS. Most spirits additionally require a minimum of 40% ABV under their specific class/type standard.

allowableRevisions: 11: change to the mandatory alcohol content statement does not require a new COLA (flavored malt beverages excepted)

failureMessages.fail: Label ABV "{extracted}" does not match application ABV "{expected}".
failureMessages.missing: Alcohol Content was not found on the label.
failureMessages.outOfBounds: ABV {value}% is outside the allowed range for {productType} ({min}%–{max}%).

fields.specialistNotes: Numeric comparison, not string comparison: "45% ABV" and "45% Alc./Vol." are equivalent formats representing the same value.

fields.onApplication: only for Distinctive Liquor Bottle Approval applications

standardFillSizesByProductType.malt: no federal standards of fill; any container size permitted

acceptedValues.notes: Sourced from lib/ttb-rules.ts SPIRITS_FILL_SIZES_ML / WINE_FILL_SIZES_ML. A tolerance of ±5 mL is applied for rounding/label-printing variance.

allowableRevisions: 10: change to net contents statement does not require a new COLA, provided it complies with standards of fill

failureMessages.fail: {value} mL is not a standard fill size for {productType} (27 CFR {citation}).
failureMessages.missing: Net Contents was not found on the label.

fields.specialistNotes: Malt beverages have no federal standard-of-fill restriction — any declared volume passes this check for malt.

acceptedValues.notes: Must be accompanied by a qualifying phrase: 'Bottled by', 'Produced by', 'Distilled by', 'Imported by', etc.

allowableRevisions: 19: name/address change within the same state does not require a new COLA

failureMessages.fail: Label bottler/producer "{extracted}" does not match application Name and Address "{expected}".
failureMessages.missing: Name and Address of bottler/producer was not found on the label.

fields.specialistNotes: Confirm the qualifying phrase (Bottled by / Produced by / Distilled by / Imported by) is consistent with the declared Source of Product and permit type.

fields.required: required only when Source of Product = Imported

acceptedValues.notes: Must be consistent with the declared Source of Product and, for wine, any appellation of origin claim.

failureMessages.fail: Label country of origin "{extracted}" does not match expected "{expected}".
failureMessages.missing: Country of Origin is required for imported products and was not found on the label.

fields.specialistNotes: Not applicable when Source of Product = Domestic; do not flag as missing in that case.

acceptedValues.exactText: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
acceptedValues.caseRule: "GOVERNMENT WARNING:" prefix must be ALL CAPS and bold

failureMessages.fail: Warning text does not match the required exact wording (27 CFR Part 16).
failureMessages.wrongCase: Warning must begin with "GOVERNMENT WARNING:" in ALL CAPS (27 CFR Part 16); title case ("Government Warning") is non-compliant.
failureMessages.missing: Government Warning Statement was not found on the label.

fields.specialistNotes: Zero tolerance for rewording, abbreviation, or paraphrasing. Buried/tiny text is flagged for visual review but is not necessarily an automatic rejection unless the type-size minimum is provably violated.

fields.required: required if a varietal is claimed on the label

acceptedValues.notes: Each varietal appearing on the label must be listed on the application. Percentage-of-varietal rules apply per 27 CFR 4.23 but are not captured here.

failureMessages.fail: Label varietal claim "{extracted}" does not match application Grape Varietal(s) "{expected}".
failureMessages.missing: A varietal is claimed on the label but was not declared on the application.

fields.specialistNotes: Only applies to wine. If no varietal is claimed on the label, this field is not applicable.

fields.required: required if an appellation of origin is stated on the label

acceptedValues.notes: Must correspond to a recognized viticultural area or political appellation, and the wine must meet the sourcing percentage required for that appellation.

failureMessages.fail: Label appellation "{extracted}" does not match application Wine Appellation "{expected}".
failureMessages.missing: An appellation is claimed on the label but Item 11 was not completed on the application.

fields.specialistNotes: Only applies to wine, and only when an appellation is actually printed on the label.

fields.required: required if a vintage year is claimed on the label

acceptedValues.notes: A four-digit calendar year. Wine must meet the minimum percentage of grapes harvested in the stated year to bear a vintage date (27 CFR 4.27).

failureMessages.fail: "{extracted}" is not a valid four-digit vintage year.
failureMessages.missing: Vintage claimed on label but no vintage date found.

fields.specialistNotes: Only applies to wine, and only when a vintage year is actually claimed on the label.

failureMessages.fail: "{extracted}" is not an accepted sulfite declaration wording.
failureMessages.missing: Sulfite Declaration is required (SO₂ ≥ 10 ppm) and was not found on the label.

fields.specialistNotes: Only applies to wine with SO₂ at or above 10 ppm; this threshold is not extractable from a label image and must be confirmed against formula/lab data.

fields.required: required when the declared class/type mandates it (e.g. straight whiskies aged less than 4 years)

failureMessages.fail: "{extracted}" does not match the required age statement format.
failureMessages.missing: Class/type "{classType}" requires an age statement and none was found on the label.

fields.specialistNotes: Only applies to spirits, and only when the specific class/type designation triggers a mandatory age statement (notably straight whiskies under 4 years old).

acceptedValues.notes: Brand name, alcohol content, and class/type designation must all appear on the same side of the container simultaneously. For cylindrical containers, all three must fall within any 40% arc of the circumference.

failureMessages.fail: Brand name, alcohol content, and class/type designation do not appear within the same 40% arc of the label (27 CFR 5.63).

fields.specialistNotes: Not a text-value field — requires visual/positional review of label artwork, not OCR text comparison alone. Applies only to distilled spirits.

failureMessages.fail: "{extracted}" is not a recognized Type of Application (a–d).
failureMessages.missing: Type of Application is required.

fields.specialistNotes: Certificate of Exemption requires the label to state 'For sale in [STATE] only' and is not available for imports or malt beverages. Resubmission requires the original TTB ID of the rejected application.

fields.required: required only when Type of Application = Distinctive Liquor Bottle Approval

acceptedValues.notes: Must be greater than or equal to the declared Net Contents to allow for headspace before closure.

failureMessages.fail: Total bottle capacity {value} mL is less than declared Net Contents {netContents} mL.
failureMessages.missing: Total Bottle Capacity Before Closure is required for Distinctive Liquor Bottle Approval applications.

fields.specialistNotes: Only relevant for non-standard bottle shapes filed under Type of Application (c).

failureMessages.missing: Phone Number is required for TTB correspondence.

fields.specialistNotes: Contact-only field; not printed on labels and not part of label matching.
Optional; if provided, TTB sends processed paper applications to this address. Not part of label matching.

failureMessages.missing: Date of Application is required.

fields.specialistNotes: Administrative timestamp only; not compared against the label.

acceptedValues.notes: Must be signed in ink by the applicant or an authorized agent, with the signer's name printed.

regulatoryCitations: Form 5100.31 Part II (Applicant's Certification, penalty of perjury)

failureMessages.missing: Signature and printed name are required under penalty of perjury certification.

fields.specialistNotes: Certification-only field; not printed on labels and not part of label matching.
